Sahara Desert Tour from Marrakech

Depart from Marrakech and travel through the Atlas Mountains to reach the Sahara desert.

Why Start from Marrakech?

  • Direct access to Atlas Mountains
  • Popular departure city
  • Wide accommodation options

Tour Highlights

  • Camel trekking in Merzouga
  • Luxury desert camp
  • Scenic mountain routes

From €450 / person

Sahara Desert Tour from Fes

Depart from Fes and journey through the Middle Atlas to the Sahara desert.

Why Start from Fes?

  • Explore the cultural capital first
  • Scenic cedar forests en route
  • Less crowded departure point

Tour Highlights

  • Camel trekking in Merzouga
  • Luxury desert camp
  • Middle Atlas landscapes

From €490 / person

Sahara Desert Tour from Casablanca

Begin your Moroccan adventure in Casablanca before heading to the Sahara.

Why Start from Casablanca?

  • International flight hub
  • See the Hassan II Mosque
  • Includes Marrakech stopover

Tour Highlights

  • Camel trekking in Merzouga
  • Luxury desert camp
  • Coastal and mountain scenery
